market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
articles.description: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.

articles.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
articles.description: If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.

articles.title: BitGo stock surges on $50 million share buyback as value languishes 65% below IPO price
articles.description: The buyback comes as newly public digital-asset firms face a tougher environment, with crypto markets lagging and investor attention shifting toward AI stocks.

articles.title: Bitcoin price sets $64.5K week-to-date low as Strategy selling worries return
articles.description: Bitcoin circled $65,000 after downside BTC price pressure into the FOMC meeting as analysis warned over the impact of Strategy potentially selling more BTC in the future.

articles.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
articles.description: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.

articles.title: Crypto’s security nightmare won’t be solved by ordinary audits
articles.description: Without an update to the current auditing infrastructure, the crypto space will likely continue to suffer significant losses, explains Beyer.

articles.title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
articles.description: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

articles.title: Mexican billionaire with 70% of his investment portfolio in bitcoin says it's better than real estate
articles.description: Ricardo Salinas Pliego, whose net worth is estimated at roughly $5 billion, is a bitcoin maximalist who told his wife to mortgage her house to buy bitcoin.

articles.title: Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting could be more about communication than rates
articles.description: While monetary policy is expected to remain unchanged, markets are focused on whether the new chair begins reshaping how the U.S. central bank communicates.

articles.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
articles.description: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

articles.title: Onchain, in court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
articles.description: The Polymarket insider trading case and a retrial of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm are expected to move forward in late 2026 while former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky awaits a response to his motion to vacate his sentence.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 3.1%, leading index lower
articles.description: Cardano (ADA), down 2.8%, was also among the underperformers.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Inveniam to acquire Mantra after turbulent year marked by OM crash
articles.description: Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, a blockchain project that spent the past year recovering from the collapse of its OM token and prolonged market pressure.

articles.title: A new Bittensor proposal would turn validators into something like fund managers
articles.description: Root Reborn would have TAO validators pick which subnets to back and reinvest yield into, rather than constantly selling subnet tokens to pay stakers. It is a code proposal in review, not a live change.

articles.title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
articles.description: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

articles.title: SpaceX's $2.6 trillion market cap nearly double that of bitcoin
articles.description: Eight days after its IPO, SpaceX has surged past $2.5 trillion to become the world's sixth-largest company. And market watchers say it is pulling the risk capital crypto wants.

articles.title: Bitcoin's June downturn leaves $8.6 billion in options out of the money
articles.description: Only 20% of June 26 options open interest is currently in the money, while bitcoin's 12% monthly decline leaves most bullish positions underwater.

articles.title: Fifth-generation Kanoo group member is moving a $6 trillion trade market onto blockchain rails
articles.description: Abdulla Kanoo says his ARP Digital firm is building settlement infrastructure for the growing flow of trade between emerging economies, a market that could reach $32 trillion by 2030.

articles.title: Three Fed signals that could make bitcoin pop
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 17, 2026
